calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Aug-27-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Defendant and moving party John Hayes (415-421-6167) appearing in Pro Per./ Atty. Andrew Catteroll (415-956-8100) appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTS TAKASHI NATSUI AND CLAIRE HOUDAILLES' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Judicial determination in Kardosh v. Hayes, CGC-13-530191 that John Hayes was not a tenant of the property after March 25, 2013 means Defendant's cross-complaint does not state facts sufficient to constitute a claim for payment from Plaintiff sub-tenant after that date. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant's Motion for Leave to File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Cross-complaint shall be filed and served no later than May 9, 2014. No opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge: Ronald Evan Quidachay. Clerk: N. Bautista. Not Reported

Mtn To Quash Or Modify Submpoena
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN HAYES' Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoena is OFF CALENDAR, subject to Defendant presenting proof of service of motion. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
